description: Root Cause and Debug Hints priority rules for GNR. Rules are evaluated in order; the first matching rule overrides the default priority. Each priority list is ordered highest-priority first.

_condition_operators_reference._summary: All conditions in a rule must be satisfied (implicit AND). Three operators work on string fields; boolean flags use direct equality.

_string_operators.{field}_in: Value is in the provided list.        e.g. "top_origreq_in": ["PortIn", "PortOut"]
_string_operators.{field}_contains: Substring present anywhere in value.  e.g. "core_mcas_contains": "bank"

_string_fields: top_origreq  – Top OrigReq value (e.g. PortIn, Read, RdCur)
top_opcode   – Top OpCode value  (e.g. RdCur, WrPush)
_boolean_fields: other_present      – true when Other is non-empty

rules.name: PortIn nuisance
rules.description: When Top OrigReq is PortIn and a CHA Hint is available with a SrcID, the CHA error is a nuisance side-effect. Demote CHA below Core so the Core failure is surfaced as the primary root cause.
